title: Tool Use Loop with Cost Annotations
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Optimization for Generative AI
description: Sequence diagram of a multi-turn tool-use loop with per-turn token annotations showing cumulative input tokens and cache savings.

educational.topic: Tool Use Loop with Cost Annotations
learningObjectives: Examine how tool-use loops accumulate input tokens because the entire prior conversation is re-sent on every turn
Identify the system prompt and tool definitions as the highest-value prompt-cache targets

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Stepwise sequence diagram with cumulative token annotations
keyQuestions: Which portion of the input grows linearly with the number of turns?
Which portion stays constant and is therefore the best cache target?
commonMisconceptions: Thinking the model 'remembers' prior turns automatically (it does not — they are re-sent)
assessmentOpportunities: Predict the cumulative input tokens after N iterations
